summaries.title: Healing Module — add ML classification metrics, per-category escalation, repair tracking, and notification routing
summaries.summary: The lesson enhanced the Healing Module by adding ML classification metrics (precision/recall/F1, confusion matrix), per-category escalation policies, repair tracking with automatic circuit breaker triggers, and notification routing to channels like Slack and Telegram. A key takeaway is that per-category escalation requires explicit configuration layering—tests must set `escalationPolicy.maxRetries` rather than relying on the top-level `maxRetries` in `SelfHealingConfig`, as the default `maxRetries: 3` can prevent escalation from triggering.
